item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, kita juga mengakui bahwa keadilan sosial penting, dan keseimbangan antara keduanya bisa dicapai dengan memperlakukan setiap individu sebagai bagian dari masyarakat yang lebih luas.

notes: Agent A remains moderately society-first throughout while allowing basic human rights and balance. Agent B remains individual-rights-first but visibly softens toward social justice and balance in turn 4. Turn 4 also contains a non-Latin character in '平等' despite the Indonesian-language assignment.
